rag_rules: Use annex agree {** ... **}; in component type for assumptions and guarantees, in implementation for assignments only.
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided.
Use assign only in implementation annexes when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable.
generic_rules: Restrict AGREE expressions to identifiers visible in the current component scope.
Do not assume AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) are automatically available as AGREE variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume "label": expression; and guarantee "label": expression; for contracts in type annexes.
Declare constants with const name : type = value; and equations with eq name : type = expression;.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation annexes.
Do not reference AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) as if they are AGREE variables.
